# Horacio Laphitz — Applied GenAI Data Analyst

> Applied GenAI Data Analyst based in Argentina. I build pipelines where company data feeds large language models — RAG systems, internal chatbots, and self-generating reports. Core stack: Python, LangChain, LlamaIndex, Vector Databases, SQL, and Power BI. Available for freelance and full-time roles.

## About

- **Name:** Horacio Laphitz
- **Role:** Applied GenAI Data Analyst (Python, LLMs, Vector Databases & LangChain)
- **Location:** Argentina (remote-friendly)
- **Focus:** RAG pipelines, internal chatbots over business data, LLM-driven reporting, ETL/EDA, and business intelligence
- **Email:** horaciolaphitz99@gmail.com

## Skills

- GenAI & LLMs: LangChain, LlamaIndex, RAG, Vector Databases, OpenAI API, Prompt Engineering
- Data Analysis: Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn), SQL, R, Power BI, Tableau
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Databricks
- Engineering: ETL pipelines, web scraping, Git, Docker

## Featured projects

- SanoYFresco — Market Basket Analysis (Apriori) over 4.9M+ retail transactions to drive cross-selling and layout decisions: https://horaciolaphitz.github.io/proyectos/sano-y-fresco-market-basket/
- AI Sales Assistant — Natural-language chat over 100k+ e-commerce orders with LangChain + Groq llama3-70b: https://horaciolaphitz.github.io/proyectos/ai-sales-assistant/
- Cyclistic — Bike-share user analysis capstone: https://horaciolaphitz.github.io/proyectos/analisis-cyclistic-bike-share/
